title: Is Russian Fuel Headed for Cuba, Testing the U.S. Blockade?
summary_full: A Russian oil tanker is being closely tracked to see if it will challenge the Trump administration’s blockade on Cuba.
summary_public: A Russian oil tanker is being closely tracked to see if it will challenge the Trump administration’s blockade on Cuba.
